title: Bacteriophages Hunt Bacteria
script_summary: Exploring how bacteriophages can target and eliminate antibiotic-resistant bacteria.

segments.voiceover: What if viruses could save us from superbugs?
Meet bacteriophages. Tiny viruses that hunt bacteria, potentially revolutionizing infection treatment.
As antibiotic resistance rises, these phages could be our last line of defense.
Preliminary studies show phages effectively target pathogens without harming us.
While research is still emerging, the potential is enormous!
Stay curious! Follow for more fascinating science insights!
